pages.text: A battlefield censer that weakens nearby monsters while feeding the wearer defensive recovery.

$(l)Default behavior$()$(br)$(li)Nearby monsters are afflicted with Weakness and Slowness$(li)If any monsters are nearby, the wearer refreshes Regeneration$(li)If enough monsters are nearby to count as a crowd, the wearer also refreshes Absorption

This is another place where $(l)Renewal$() is the right player-facing term. The censer does not grant a separate custom Renewal effect; instead, it keeps refreshing the survival tools that let you hold a dangerous zone.
